final:
module add_const(input wire[3:0] in_val, input wire[3:0] const_val, output reg[3:0] out_val);
    
    always @* begin
        out_val = ((in_val + const_val) > 4'b0111) ? 4'b0111 : (in_val + const_val);
    end
    
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out_val <= 4'b1111; if (in_val == 4'b0000 && const_val == 4'b0000) begin out_val <= 4'b0000; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: out_val <= 4'b1111; if (in_val == 4'b0000 && const_val == 4'b0000) begin out_val <= 4'b0000; end
